reasons: Barats can survive Paquito's melee burst and punish Paquito's commitment.
Detona's Welcome gives Barats a direct suppression-style answer when Paquito enters too far.

proof.summary: Paquito wants to dive into short range and chain combos, while Barats can absorb the entry and punish him with devour or suppression control.
worksBestWhen: Barats has enough stacks and durability before Paquito commits.
Barats uses Detona's Welcome after Paquito enters.
failureCases: Barats is kited before he can control Paquito.
Paquito baits the ultimate and disengages.
Barats lacks follow-up damage after the suppression.

reasons: Khufra directly punishes Paquito's dash-based entry.
Bouncing Ball can interrupt Paquito's rhythm and prevent him from freely chaining combos.

proof.summary: Paquito wants to dash in and chain burst, while Khufra can punish blink-style movement and stop the combo path.
worksBestWhen: Khufra saves Bouncing Ball for Paquito's real entry.
Khufra positions near the target Paquito wants to dive.
failureCases: Khufra is controlled before he can block the dash.
Paquito fights after Khufra's anti-dash tool is unavailable.

reasons: Minsitthar can restrict Paquito's mobility inside King's Calling.
This reduces Paquito's freedom to chain dashes and reposition during a fight.

proof.summary: Paquito wants repeated mobility and combo resets, while Minsitthar can force him to fight inside an anti-blink zone.
worksBestWhen: The team collapses while Paquito is trapped.
failureCases: Paquito plays around the edge of the field.
Paquito's team disengages and re-enters later.

reasons: Obsidia can punish mobile heroes by limiting dash or blink options with Hunt of Bone.
This is relevant against Paquito because he depends on skill movement to maintain pressure.

proof.summary: Paquito wants to use mobility to enter, chase, or exit, while Obsidia can punish that mobility pattern when Hunt of Bone is timed correctly.
worksBestWhen: Obsidia casts after Paquito starts his engage.
Paquito has no safe target to reset around.
failureCases: Paquito avoids the marked or punish window.
Obsidia is bursted before controlling the fight.

reasons: Kaja can suppress Paquito after he commits to a combo.
This prevents Paquito from finishing his chain or escaping after a short trade.

proof.summary: Paquito wants fast burst windows, while Kaja can stop one key entry with suppression and force a pickoff.
failureCases: Paquito's team counter-engages after the pull.
